warnings.message: Finite aperture/blocker has flux monitors within two wavelengths of the scatterer in the generated helper scene; move monitors farther away for production convergence runs.
Finite aperture/blocker has aperture edges; treat downstream fields as diagnostic until resolution/PML convergence is shown.
Finite aperture/blocker finite FDTD screen is compared only to scalar limiting-case diffraction references; finite thickness and finite screen size can shift residuals.
Estimated FDTD grid is large; external execution may require coarser resolution or HPC resources.
Finite aperture/blocker edge fields are diagnostic and need convergence evidence.
